text.title: AI Slop Detector Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is ≥30% of the draft AI-generated AND going to a public surface?

text.example: AI-drafted blog post scored 85/100 with hedging_count=1 → ship.
